steps.title: Clear the denominator
steps.content: Start with $$v=-\frac{w}{180x}$$ Multiply both sides by $180x$: $$180vx=-w$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The correct answer is $w=-180vx$, so A is correct.

steps.title: Keep the negative sign
steps.content: Multiplying by $180x$ clears the denominator but leaves $180vx=-w$. The last step must multiply by $-1$, so the final expression for $w$ is negative.
